---
title: "James Baldwin"
---

## James Baldwin

**Dates:** (b. Tanworth, Warwicks. 1824/5)

### Description

maltster

### Biography

He is recorded in the 1881 and 1891 censuses as a maltster living at Compton with his wife Josephine (b. Solihull 1826/7), in the former year ‘employing 2 men & 2 boys’.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 26th [after 1884?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
